title: Gilead's Trodelvy Wins Front-Line Triple-Negative Breast Cancer Approval
headline: FDA approves Gilead's Trodelvy (sacituzumab govitecan) for first-line triple-negative breast cancer, marking a major label expansion.
key_facts: FDA approval for first-line TNBC; Trodelvy is Trop-2-targeting ADC; previously approved in later-line metastatic TNBC; TNBC represents 10-15% of breast cancers; GILD +0.09% at $125.16; market cap $155.395B; direct competition with Merck Keytruda + chemo

title: FDA Approves Breast Cancer Expansion for Pfizer's Ibrance
headline: FDA approves a new breast cancer indication for Pfizer's Ibrance (palbociclib).
key_facts: FDA approval of new breast cancer indication for Ibrance CDK4/6 inhibitor; June 24, 2:48pm publication; positive regulatory development amid Seagen ADC setback; PFE -2.75% on day

title: Eli Lilly Expands Abbisko Partnership to $1.9B
headline: Eli Lilly expands its partnership with Chinese biotech Abbisko Therapeutics in a discovery collaboration worth up to $1.9 billion.
key_facts: Total deal value up to $1.9 billion; builds on existing 2022 pact with Chinese biotech Abbisko; June 24, 6:14am publication; amid rising US-China tension

title: Novartis Taps Antares in Small Molecule Discovery Pact
headline: Novartis partners with Antares Therapeutics in a small molecule discovery collaboration paying $105M upfront to target multiple undruggable cancer targets.
key_facts: $105 million upfront payment to Antares; small molecule focus on undruggable cancer targets; Antares CEO Adam Friedman; June 24, 10:56am publication; high conviction signal

title: HHS Moves to Fast-Track Early Drug Research vs. China
headline: HHS announces reforms designed to entice companies to start early-phase clinical trials in the US rather than overseas.
key_facts: Series of newly planned HHS reforms; explicit response to China's growing drug development role; could affect trial design, IND filing, and competitive dynamics

title: Ollin Raises $330M for Vabysmo Challenger Pivotal Trials
headline: $330 million raised for pivotal trials of a Roche Vabysmo challenger in ophthalmology.
key_facts: $330 million raised; Phase 3 pivotal trials; challenger to Roche's Vabysmo (faricimab) in ophthalmology; Vabysmo generated ~$5.5B in 2025 sales for Roche

title: ADC Therapeutics Cuts 17% of Workforce on Zynlonta Safety Concerns
headline: ADC Therapeutics plots 17% staff cuts amid Zynlonta safety concerns.
key_facts: 17% workforce reduction; linked to safety concerns with Zynlonta (loncastuximab tesirine) ADC for lymphoma; June 24, 10:19am publication; part of broader ADC setback trend

title: Ionis Wins FDA Label Expansion for Triglycerides Indication
headline: Ionis wins FDA label expansion for triglycerides indication in severe hypertriglyceridemia.
key_facts: FDA label expansion for potential blockbuster triglycerides indication; antisense platform; June 24 publication; cardiovascular metabolic is massive market

title: Nature Retracts PD-1 Time-of-Day Study
headline: Nature Medicine retracts provocative PD-1 time-of-day dosing study after identifying serious problems.
key_facts: Nature Medicine editorial retraction; cited 'amount and nature of the problems identified'; June 24 publication; immunotherapy dosing strategy study
